title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Sanji, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Queen as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MOMOIRD ISLAND

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: KAMA- BAKKA QUEEN- DOM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh dear. Did we wake you, sweetie?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter. Hold still while we put this on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huff! Huff!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My, my! Having a hard time, >Dahling?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bet I am. Geez, those new kamas.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're on the prowl both day and night.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hafta find a nook to hide in if I want any sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait... Iva?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: don't worry, dahling. I'm com- pletely neutral on the matter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I just like to watch ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Watch and enjoy as you fight...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: EMPORIO IVANKOV QUEEN (Eternally off duty) Kamabakka Queendom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to earn the right to the 99 vital recipes of attack (Cutsine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Not so loud!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vital recipes are secret techniques of the new kama kempo style. These recipes strengthen the physique of all who eat them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right now they lie in the hands of the 99 masters.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want them, you must take them by force!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though, if you'd just put on this sweets dress and let your inner maiden out, I'd teach them to you right away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uh, no thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid I'm not here to join up with you ladies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I live to love ladies with all my heart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The challenge is to steal the recipes through battle, so that's what I'm gonna do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This fight should also make me stronger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to clash with your top masters as soon as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O40 40 40 40 40. Careful what you wish for, dahling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take Caroline, who served as queen while I was away in Impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That sweetheart is one of the five best fighters in our Queendom's history!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the other masters are each as strong as a Battalion.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It won't be as easy to win as you think!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
